---
title: "Media and optional backends"
subtitle: "Plan heavier extractors before installing or running them."
sidebar: start
---

## Why plan first

Media routes can depend on system tools or model packages. Planning lets you inspect the route, dependency class, and default parameters before execution.

```{python}
from natural_features.workflows import plan_features

plan = plan_features(
    "image",
    features=["vision.clip"],
    budget="allow_python",
)
plan.to_recipe()
```

## Common optional routes

| Feature ID | Input | Dependency | Named result |
|---|---|---|---|
| `video.audio.extract` | video path | `ffmpeg` | extract mono WAV-like audio at `sr_hz` |
| `image.ocr` | image | OCR backend | Tesseract word events |
| `video.ocr` | video | OCR backend | OCR sampled frames into word events |
| `audio.egemaps` | audio | openSMILE | eGeMAPS descriptors |
| `vision.face` | image or video | MediaPipe | face count and geometry summaries |
| `vision.clip` | image or video | transformers + torch | frame/image embeddings |
| `vision.dino` | image or video | transformers + torch | frame/image embeddings |
| `vision.motion_energy` | video | moten / pymoten | motion-energy pyramid |
| `vision.semantic_views` | video | CLIP via transformers + torch | semantic frame labels |
| `speech.neural_vad` | audio | silero-vad + torch | speech probability track |
| `speech.diarization` | audio | pyannote.audio | speaker activity tracks |

## Fail-fast execution

Strict execution is the default: a named feature raises if its dependency or
model is unavailable. No mode flag is required:

```python
feature_params = {
    "vision.clip": {
        "local_files_only": True,
    }
}
```

For a test double or pipeline rehearsal, explicitly set
`execution_mode="fallback"`. The result is a proxy with different semantics,
not CLIP output.

## Read next

[Feature catalogue](../concepts/feature-catalogue.qmd) · [Execution modes](../concepts/execution-modes.qmd)
